_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Maintainability Status Report
summary: This Data Item Description provides a report to monitor and evaluate contractor progress and accomplishments in conducting the maintainability program for the applicable contract end items.
use_relationship: To monitor and evaluate contractor's progress and accomplishments in conducting the maintainability program for the applicable contract end item(s).
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: Each report shall include all the information required by Paragraph 103.2 of MIL-STD-470.

children.title: The work accomplished and results obtained on each task defined by the contractor's approved Maintainability Program Plan.
Summaries of the status of previously reported problems which were unresolved at the close of the last reporting period.
A list of current problems containing:
A serial number assigned to identify the problem.
The date on which the problem was first detected.
A short statement identifying the problem and its effect.
The activity assigned to work on the problem.
The expected resolution and date to be achieved.
A short statement of accomplishment to-date or a cross-reference to other reports.
The date the problem was resolved.
A specific accounting of each design review action item remaining open at the end of the last report period including a full description of the action taken on each item.

Identification of observed potential maintainability problems introduced by Government-furnished equipment and descriptions of accommodations or improvement changes deemed necessary to make such equipment compatible.

preparation_instructions.title: Graphic discussion.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall include a graphic discussion of trends. A breakdown to the configuration item level shall be made in the following maanner: See actual DID for details.

preparation_instructions.title: Proposed changes.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall include proposed changes to the Maintainability Program Plan (as applicable).

preparation_instructions.title: Final Status Report.
preparation_instructions.content: The Final Status Report can be identified as the Program Summary Report.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall be prepared in accordance with ANSI Z39.18, "Scientific and Technical Reports: Organization, Preparation,and Production".
